our_open_deliverables.text: Deliver indicative pricing for P2P and full S2P modules with ROI/time-to-value models by Wed 13 Mar 2026.
Send Zycus note taker transcript to 6 Mar demo participants.
Send screenshot showing where to create credit memos in AP Smartdesk interface.
Send details about Trustpair bank account validation integration.
Email details of April London roundtable event to the consultant leading the stream.
Share examples of sourcing-event countdown dashboards for multiple events.
Share the Horizon website link with meeting attendees.

buyer_dependent_items.text: Provide total spend data (including February figures) to Zycus for business case and ROI analysis.
Propose availability slots for the contract management demo session to Zycus.
Produce outline business case options paper for senior leadership review in the next few weeks.

competitive_position.summary: No competitor has been named in any source (Salesforce field empty, no call mention). Darren Stanley confirmed on 11 Jun 2026 that A2Dominion is evaluating multiple providers in discovery phase, meaning Zycus is in a competitive pool, but the identity, count, and threat level of rivals are unknown. The only competitive signal is that a formal RFP/tender will be required (per UK Procurement Act thresholds) once EMT approves the change program, at which point the full vendor shortlist will be disclosed. Current positioning: Zycus demonstrated strong fit on AI/Merlin capabilities (genAI requisition, AI contract analysis, compliance automation with CDP API integration), and buyer engagement was highest on those topics (24 Mar call), but no confirmation of preferred-vendor status or sole-source consideration. Competitive threat level: unknown. The lack of competitor intelligence is a genuine knowledge gap, not a hygiene issue, because Darren has not disclosed the field and no other buyer speaker has mentioned a rival.

champion_strength.summary: Darren Stanley is an active, helpful champion driving the evaluation and pushing the internal business case, but he is a contractor without EMT power and the deal is single-threaded to him. Strength is capped until a powered internal advocate with CFO/EMT access is developed.

meddpicc_economic_buyer.narrative: The Economic Buyer is the A2Dominion CFO, named on 09 Mar 2026 by Darren Stanley: 'The CFO has had a conversation with me and my counterpart to say that this is a priority in terms of the system.' The CFO's specific name was not disclosed and the CFO has never appeared on a call. Budget authority sits with the senior leadership / EMT, who are continuously reprioritizing the change portfolio (Darren Stanley, 11 Jun 2026). So the EB role is identified but unengaged: there is no direct pricing, budget, or ROI conversation with the CFO on record. Getting a named CFO contact and a direct value conversation is the highest-leverage power move.

recommended_moves: Build a quantified ROI/value model from A2Dominion's spend data for Darren's business case.
Scope and send the paid POC proposal with required A2Dominion commitment to Darren for Anthony Gray's review.
Secure a direct introduction to the named CFO (economic buyer) via Darren for a value conversation.
